root_cause: CVR improved +0.51pp (4.73%→5.24%) — C2O explains 86% of ΔCVR, driven by broad-based checkout improvement in MB · Paid · Google Ads (C2A +3.3pp, A2O +1.5pp) and a favourable catalogue mix shift toward lower-friction experiences. Italy domestic traffic surged +26.7% on seasonal ramp. About half the lift is seasonal (LY repeated same shape); structural_delta_cvr +0.23pp. HO segment diluted from scaling (+38.8% traffic) but absolute HO orders still grew +18%.
